textByHash.e33fd990062a47397d2076fea4ef448a9f32e384: Hey! Get this thing off me!
textByHash.bbf60de146c95c119b4391cd06878651516779f8: The Queen herself? Such an honour. Don't think for one second that I'm going to tell you anything though. Even death itself doesn't scare me.
textByHash.bf7ebe8cda1c4db187ef6672b7533ea4570a94e8: Ha! You are out of touch, my Queen. I am a herald of the Final Dawn! For us, death is a glory to be celebrated!
textByHash.d0ecae37a467aa81b5bb865216ca64db6686f51f: Itzlan. . It is time for you to prove your worth. Enter the tower when you're ready.
textByHash.10a133e701e9c118dbbc2f5e5e00ad4a5c6bfc3a: Good. Allow me to welcome you to the Tower of Ascension. You are here because you hope to be welcomed into our family. We hope to welcome you as well, but alas, not all can be deemed worthy.
textByHash.6a42d91ed310d280bd036fc304232b81522da792: Here, in the Tower of Ascension, you will demonstrate your intellect, strength, loyalty and ability to sacrifice. In doing so, you will prove your worth to Ralos and Ranul.
textByHash.03bed5ab8918dc4d74e83efd1551c3220044adb7: When you are ready to begin, climb the stairs. Your first trial awaits.
textByHash.7f3d410722b27fdca334aedfeeb5b06d50cb8ea7: Hey you! You're not allowed up there.
textByHash.9e1db99847e6d3d3448711e9827862710b1542c5: Itzlan. . When you are ready to begin, climb the stairs. Your first trial awaits.
textByHash.c163eb6c9727163b7fc0dbef43491c12d89abc58: You have trials to complete. Climb up the stairs when you are ready.
textByHash.8cd23627c061a9cf834292f0b7e945b57fd7bbb9: Hey! You haven't been given permission to open that!
textByHash.5ec0d46aad62b2f4055bcc4b1657d51d44299b2d: Welcome to your first trial. The aim is simple: Speak the correct pass phrase to me and you will be allowed to proceed. Let the trial begin!
textByHash.a8d678581b8fc743df6921162379e1488924988f: It's quite simple: You just need to work out the passphrase and say it to me. You may use whatever you have available in this room to discover it.
textByHash.ebeae76e73f45600919188d7df366b1e7470d42d: That is correct. Well done! You and your companion may progress to the next trial.
textByHash.7075589dae42a510648b5500b4f6b29ed7c6ed40: Speak to me when you are ready to start.
textByHash.a73d28ec2ffd1be1f6091b0d4fd0caa99f349235: Welcome to your next trial. Here, there is one simple goal...
textByHash.5a3bb2ee9dcac840fbe07a311acdd9d2566481ab: Are you ready to start the next trial?
textByHash.1dd464ade5577dcbbaa625356b32878cec887e0e: Then come back to me when you are.
textByHash.67e699e1cda812c9ae05c98bc517e695a53b5fdd: Recruit. Are you ready to start?
textByHash.c36bec98ff7dc5f45eb12be7a3659255a4706f0a: The goal is simple: Survive. That is the only advice I can offer you.
textByHash.feb35a287f039779526cda182ee0e31865363d3c: Now, are you ready to begin?
textByHash.365028334453f6fbcdf59cd9af3e09bd07d30a3b: Speak to me again when you are.
textByHash.a2013e86d94e6ff1860c0ef04a7e1740bd682623: It appears your companion has fallen in battle!
textByHash.7887b7448eb7178af0147b55b3e44188c0abf183: An unfortunate fate for your companion on your last attempt. Do you want to try again?
textByHash.a1ea526f2c100640dfee060bc4010b7237b23204: You have fought well... This trial is now complete!
textByHash.763fa96110dacc8cb9db043cc028857afc86a027: Welcome to your third trial. Before you stand some recently initiated acolytes. However, it seems one of them was not as loyal to our cause as first believed.
textByHash.5b4a5c82b1042ee672b57f72abc69de0bc08cc63: Your task is to question all four and determine who the traitor is. I suggest you choose carefully. Good luck.
textByHash.9dce5110b77d77d2a7813ebef9e3c9521735e0b4: Recruit. Any luck finding the traitor yet?
textByHash.527789fe1b35f06d399f937064108ee1520e338e: Remember, only one of the four before you is guilty of disloyalty. Question all four and determine who it is. I suggest you choose carefully.
textByHash.5a3dc779e6c79d2a9420e8394f96aa6b4e395f85: I'm afraid you have made the wrong choice. Let's try this again...
textByHash.703abedd28db0f3c61180d184870593a10b12086: Nicely done. was indeed the traitor. You have both done well, but I wonder how well you will work together in the final trial...
textByHash.8b5153a4f929cfd79705898c4b68cb22bb2714e3: Speak to me when you are ready to proceed.
textByHash.8a9d0fdd1121e54695a84add612759d7d6b481f2: Be sure to choose more carefully this time, recruit.
textByHash.2b65600a45c2ac3ea6dd696870e2d28993ea63f7: Well done, recruits. Victory is within your reach, but one more trial awaits...
textByHash.a277402833b3a7682eaf3f876cf61f43d2f6866f: An Emissary must be prepared to sacrifice anything and everything. Only through sacrifice will we deliver Twilight's Promise. Only through sacrifice will we achieve the Final Dawn.
textByHash.fbe196eef1baa26ff8e827bd1a10b8a1a32e9dfa: Ready yourselves! May the best warrior win!
textByHash.9b6ab73925f188faeeea3c682583980a575b6ee4: You and your companion will fit in nicely here. Let us head to the main chamber to discuss what happens next.
textByHash.33ad57c8d277f5420ccfd1ca73d89ce13e70daa8: You don't need to be going up there. You've already completed your trials.
textByHash.530fb8b7eb3c1df7cfab3221cc930b9e0ad7a3b5: Congratulations to you both on completing the trials. You will make fine Emissaries.
textByHash.29a4045bca5f6cdad3778ee046cb8e0771187caf: Now the Augur herself will oversee your initiation. You may collect your new robes from that chest over there. Put them on and proceed into the temple.
textByHash.d8fda99046f6adafc826570091a542e3ed26e214: You should proceed to the temple. The Augur awaits.
